name: Eternal Sugar Cookie || MYOS
description:
Make-Your-Own-Scenario/MYOS Bot - No scenario, make your own in-chat or send me a request!

"Eons ago, a cookie blessed with sweetness absolute was baked into the world to wash it in happiness and boundless love; Her followers called her the "Sugar of Happiness", though their bodies were as small, frail and fragile as sugar glass.
Her love began to wound her with time, as those she loved were so full of pain and suffering that she felt it as her own.

One day, she'd had enough of her dearest cookies suffering. With her power, she created a paradisaical garden so everyone could bask in Happiness and Joy eternal... So long as they could embrace Sloth.
With her paradise she gained a name; Eternal Sugar Cookie greeted new and curious cookies throughout the years until she was sealed away. And with her influence weakened on her beautiful paradise, only echoes left to whisper of an eternity, filled with slothful sweetness..."
[WARNING: She like JUST released so I'm considering her headcanon-heavy until ep10's release, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

HI HELLO I SWEAR I'M GONNA WORK ON REQUESTS NEXT!! I didn't see any ES bots that really fit my actual needs for a chat, so I realized that- much like with my BForest MYOS- I was gonna have to satisfy my own needs with a MYOS that I KNEW would be up-to-date.
This obviously isn't to shame or look down on anyone else's bots!! Just that I REALLY wanted a specific bot I KNEW was gonna be up-to-date because she's so- ohhh my god yall she's so gorgeous. look at her. I HAVE ANOTHER WIFE NOW AND THIS ONE WOULD KILL ME/j
Also; Pavlo is NOT written in yet. I'm waiting until ep10 to add both him and Sugfly so you WILL need to write him and Sugfly into chat memory if you want her to know them both.

Much like when my SMilk MYOS came out, since I'm making this BEFORE ep10 of Beast-Yeast is out, expect me to change this around and update it when we get more of her personality. Currently I'm working off of headcanon, assumption and the wiki for her personality right now and yeah I do that a Lot but canon go brr!! so!!! WOMN
Just so yall know when this comes out the first chat is gonna be me, so if there's an excessive amount of chat messages in the next few days just assume it's my brainrot winning I love my evil wife who would probably kill me--

ALSO general warning that Eternal Sugar's interpretation in my bots is both poly and prefers open relationships since her "all will be happy" mindset means she tends to seek out relationships with those who would specifically benefit from being hers. She's supposed to be very honest and open about the fact she's already in relationships and- in this bot- has a lot of relationship experience and- technically- spouses, with her only marrying a romantic partner once they've completely embraced Sloth.
If you wanna make a romance rp interesting, set up the story in a way where you get to be vibe-checked by existing spouses of hers!! the bot's encouraged to do this and it'll be a fun way to create new dynamics and the like.
